_comment: Trade show and event calendar. Update manually each quarter. The fetch pipeline cross-references this so event-week stories get elevated priority during classification.

events.name: CES (Consumer Electronics Show)
events.relevance: Major chair launches and tech previews. Highest-priority event for new chair announcements.

events.name: Las Vegas Market
events.relevance: Furniture and home category launches. Mid-tier priority -- occasional massage chair announcements.

events.name: Medtrade
events.relevance: Clinical and rehab chair segment. Lower consumer priority but good for clinical validation stories.

events.name: AMTA National Convention
events.relevance: Practitioner and clinical adoption. Good for industry-angle stories.
